template_data.headline_html: Five errors that stall your application before it starts.

items.title: Expired registration
items.sub: SAM auto-expires every 12 months — no reminder sent

items.title: Wrong NAICS codes
items.sub: Missing the categories agencies actually buy from you

items.title: Outdated point of contact
items.sub: The person who registered left the company years ago

items.title: Entity name mismatch
items.sub: Doesn't match legal docs — triggers verification delays

items.title: Exclusions check skipped
items.sub: Rare, but it surfaces the moment you submit

template_data.image_headline: STALE SAM STOPS YOUR SCHEDULE COLD
template_data.image_prompt: Infographic alert layout on dark navy background. Bold warning headline across top: 'STALE SAM STOPS YOUR SCHEDULE COLD' with a caution triangle icon. Left column: illustrated professional man in business casual reviewing a laptop screen, expression of concern. Right column: 5 checklist rows, each with a red X icon and a SHORT 2-3 word label stacked vertically: 'EXPIRED REG', 'WRONG NAICS', 'OLD POC', 'NAME MISMATCH', 'EXCL. SKIPPED'. Bottom: lighter navy banner with short callout: 'AUDIT FIRST'. Clean, minimal. Footer text: 'William Hill · GSA Focus'.
